title: Preserve Studio Event-Driven Runtime Boundaries
forbids: browser operation reads outside the event owner, live-runtime timer cadence, browser storage outside admitted owners, and live-game watcher transport/runtime ownership
why: The Studio event stream and daemon current-state registry own operation truth. Live-game events trigger bounded reads, browser storage has three explicit owners, and the server watcher consumes an injected read effect; callers may not create alternate polling, persistence, transport, or runtime authority.
remediate: Reconcile daemon state only in useStudioEvents, trigger live-runtime reads from live-game events, route storage through the admitted state/theme owners, and inject the watcher's read effect.
message: Studio event-driven runtime or browser-state authority escaped its admitted owner.
